content.en:
"This is it!"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain took Ye Tian to a stone step in Xuyang 1L and said, "Walking up this stone step is a test. "

Ye Tian looked at the number of stone steps, there were about a hundred layers: "May I ask what results do I need to achieve to pass the assessment of the white-bearded old man?"

"The requirement of the half-step Legendary Realm is to go to the end, that is, the hundredth stone step. The requirement of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm is the fiftieth stone step, and as for the half-step Transcendental Legendary Lord, the master has not mentioned it, so if you want to meet the master, you must go to the fiftieth stone step. "

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain said.

The 50th step.

Ye Tian said that he knew, and walked to the first stone step.

What is the mystery of these stone steps, he doesn't know, and he can't see it outside, if he can see it, it will be strange, after all, this is a test set by the old man of the peak legendary realm lord Bai Xu "Shen Sisan", it must be extremely mysterious.

Ye Tian stepped on the first stone step and was immediately trapped in a world.

He didn't attack this world immediately, but silently comprehended the mysteries of this place.

"This world is actually composed of many innate and eternal rules, and it is also mixed with the power of will, space and time, if you don't have a deep understanding, it is difficult to break this world, it is not possible to break it by force, and brute force cannot tear apart the world built by the white-bearded old man. "

Ye Tian quickly understood the key to this world and pointed out.

Immediately, the world shattered apart.

Immediately, Ye Tian stepped into the second stone step

Similarly, the same was true of this second stone step, but it was a little more complicated than the world of the first stone step, but it was also quickly broken by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian walked one world after another, and the Lord of the Shaking Mountain didn't pay much attention to Ye Tian.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian gradually came to the fiftieth step.

At this point, he can already stop, because he has passed the test.

However, if this is the case, it will not be taken seriously by the old man with white beard at all, even if he sees the old man with white beard?

No, the white-bearded old man won't give it to him.

So, he had to be more demonic.

He's going to the end.

When he reached the sixtieth step, he found that the world behind him was getting closer and closer to the essence of mastering space and time.

Suddenly, he noticed that the steps in front of him had split into two directions.

One must represent space, and the other must represent time.

At this time, Ye Tian understood something.

This so-called test is to test the degree of control of the half-step Legendary Realm Lords over time or space, if the control is not high, it means that they are far away from the Legendary Realm Lord, maybe they will not be able to become the Legendary Realm Lord, then they will not be able to get the attention of the white-bearded old man.

If you go and count the hundredth stone steps, you will almost have a great hope of completely destroying time and space, and you will naturally be qualified to see the white-bearded old man.

Ye Tian didn't hesitate at all, he walked to the stone steps that represented time and continued to move forward.

The sixty-first step!

Sixty-second steps!

Sixty-third steps

Ye Tian still walked one step after another at a very fast speed, and soon came to the ninety-ninth step.

At this time, Ye Tian needed to spend a little time to crack the world, which showed that the half-step Legendary Realm Lord who had broken through here was very close to completely controlling time.

"The hundredth stone staircase!"

Ye Tian stepped on.

One second!

One minute!

Ten minutes!

One month!

One year!

Rumble!

Ye Tian shattered the world, walked out, and officially passed the hundredth stone steps.

When Ye Tian walked through a hundred stone steps, a golden path of light appeared and came to Ye Tian's face.

And at this time, the Lord of the Shaking Mountain finally paid attention to Ye Tian, and was immediately shocked.

"You passed the hundredth stone staircase?"

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain asked.

"Yes. "

Ye Tian nodded.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain stared at Ye Tian incredulously, he almost took a nap, and Ye Tian walked through the hundredth stone steps, what this meant, he knew very well.

He wouldn't be surprised if a prestigious half-step Legendary Realm did this, but Ye Tian was only a half-step Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord!

"Lord of the Shaking Mountain, can I see the white-bearded old man?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Shaking Mountain pointed to the golden avenue at Ye Tian's feet and said, "From here, you can meet the master.Remember, if you see the master, you can ask a question or request, but don't ask too much, understand?"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded0........

Immediately, Ye Tian embarked on this golden avenue.

It was as if he had crossed a space-time dimension in one step, and layers of space-time were walked by him, a bit like approaching an untouchable unknown existence.

After a long time, he walked to the residence of the white-bearded old man in Xuyang Mountain.

What surprised him was that the white-bearded old man's residence was very quaint, just an ordinary bamboo house campus, two stone benches, a stone table, an old man, and a pot of tea.

When Ye Tian saw the old man, he knew that he was a white-bearded old man.

The white-bearded old man is as his name suggests, with a handful of white beards.

In fact, when you reach the peak of the Legendary Realm Lord, you will naturally not get old, but some Eternal Realm Lords like to become old people, or because they are old.

"I've seen the white-bearded old man!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Sit!"

The white-bearded old man said.

Ye Tian sat down, and a cup of tea appeared in front of him.

"Drink it and savor it!"

The white-bearded old man said again.

Ye Tian did so, drank this cup of tea, and savored it carefully.

Suddenly, countless insights and inspirations emerged

He has already controlled time, but this time, he has comprehended the space, but he has a lot of perception and improvement in the space, and this cup of tea saves at least millions of eternal years of penance.

"Good tea, thank you for the tea!

Ye Tian thanked.

"This is Dadao tea, the first cup has the best effect, at most 0.9 three cups, after three cups, it is ordinary tea, but it is also quite good to drink occasionally. The white-bearded old man said with a smile.

Of course, only a peak legendary realm like the white-bearded old man would not take such a great avenue tea seriously, and other legendary realm lords did not have such a background.

"You are very demonic, the half-step transcendence realm legendary lord has mastered the time, if it spreads, I am afraid that even many legendary realm lords will be extremely shocked. You should have come to me for the time and space ancient leaves, right?"

The white-bearded old man asked suddenly.

Ye Tian was naturally not surprised that he was seen through, he was able to break through the hundredth stone steps, and he could guess some of them.

So, he replied, "Old Man Whitebeard, I am indeed for the Ancient Leaves of Time and Space. Please also ask the white-bearded old man to give me a piece of time and space ancient leaves, and I am willing to pay any price. "_
